# Image Generation Module

Module ID: image-generation
Status: available
Class: provider
Purpose: Text-to-image generation + editing across pluggable providers (kie.ai nano-banana, Gemini, GPT-image), R2-backed bytes with tenant-scoped keys, D1 gallery, configurable default provider + fallback.
Entrypoint: src/index.ts

RPC exposed: generateImage, editImage, listImages, getImage, deleteImage
Events emitted: image.generated, image.edited, image.deleted
Hook points: beforeGenerate (filter), onImageGenerated (observer)
Resources: D1 DB (image_generations), R2 IMAGE_BUCKET
Permissions: image.generate, image.read, image.admin, image.extend, image.observe

Providers are wired by the host from API keys; only configured providers run.
Selection: override -> defaultProvider -> fallbackOrder, advancing only on 429/5xx.

Check: pnpm check:spec
Build: pnpm build
Test: pnpm test
